web.description: Elegant Miami residences that epitomize the timeless Italian spirit and style, offering sweeping Biscayne Bay views and signature services and amenities, ...
web.markdown:
Now Under Construction

* * *

### Positioned on a privileged location at the gateway to the vibrant Miami neighborhood of Brickell, Cipriani Residences Miami epitomizes the timeless Italian spirit, style, and service for which the brand is so revered. Residents will enjoy a life of effortless elegance and convenient access to the wealth of experiences this exciting metropolis has to offer.

![](https://ciprianiresidencesmiami.com/_nuxt/e3bd2eafbb6e62730a0e54b7e87304fb.svg)

![](https://images.prismic.io/cipriani/aVwBzXNYClf9oy_7_EXT04_Crown_B6_New.jpg?auto=format&rect=720,0,1354,1692&w=800&h=1000&fit=clip&q=100)

A Grand Vision

Masterfully crafted by a renowned design team, the distinctive glass tower features an organic, curved façade and nautical details reminiscent of the Italian Riviera.

[Discover the Vision](https://ciprianiresidencesmiami.com/a-grand-vision)

BESPOKE RESIDENCES

Inspired by their location and Cipriani’s distinguished style, each home offers true comfort and privacy, providing all that is necessary for a life of effortless pleasure.

[Explore The Interiors](https://ciprianiresidencesmiami.com/residences)

* * *

## CIPRIANI LEGACY

Cipriani Residences Miami continues the brand’s storied tradition, with residences that are true to its convivial, stylish spirit.

[EXPLORE THE LEGACY](https://ciprianiresidencesmiami.com/cipriani-legacy)

* * *

### “TRUE STYLE IS SINGULAR AND TIMELESS. IT CAN BE SENSED BUT CANNOT BE DESCRIBED.”

ARRIGO CIPRIANI

![](https://ciprianiresidencesmiami.com/_nuxt/e3bd2eafbb6e62730a0e54b7e87304fb.svg)

### EXCLUSIVE AMENITIES

To live in Cipriani Residences Miami is to enjoy the signature service standards first established at Harry’s Bar in 1931 and perfected through four generations.

[EXPERIENCE THE AMENITIES](https://ciprianiresidencesmiami.com/amenities)

### VIBRANT BRICKELL

Brickell, known for its cosmopolitan feel, boasts exceptional restaurants, fashionable boutiques, a vibrant art scene, and many cultural attractions.

[EXPLORE THE NEIGHBORHOOD](https://ciprianiresidencesmiami.com/brickell)

* * *

[SCHEDULE A PRIVATE\\
\\
APPOINTMENT](https://ciprianiresidencesmiami.com/contact)

[**EXPLORE THE  LEGACY**](https://ciprianiresidencesmiami.com/cipriani-legacy)

web.description: Cipriani Residences Miami is a spectacular residential condominium building in Brickell, with 80 stories and 405 luxury residences of 1 to 4 bedrooms.
web.markdown:
![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/menubarmrg_bg2.png)

[![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/MRG-LOGO-White.png)](https://miamiresidential.com/)

Your browser does not support the video tag.


![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/03/01-Cipriani-Residences-Miami-Building.jpg)

# Cipriani Residences Miami

### **Brickell / 2028**

80 Stories / 405 Residences of
1, 2, 3 & 4 Bedrooms

**1420 S Miami Ave, Miami, FL 33130, USA**

[+1.305.647.2639](tel:13056472639)

Average Price: $1,700 x SF ($18,299 x M2)

Cipriani Residences Miami is a spectacular residential condominium building in Brickell, with 80 stories and 405 luxury residences of 1 to 4 bedrooms, with amazing water and city views. The perfect blend of venetial hospitality and Brickell living.
Masterfully designed in collaboration with Cipriani, the building’s amenities serve as an extension of one’s home. Residents have exclusive access to round-the-clock dining services by Cipriani, available both in-home or in private, reservable dining rooms. In addition, this fabulous condo offers more than 18,000 square feet of commercial spaces, 1,650 parking spaces, 2,472 spaces for bicycles, super luxury amenities with 2 swimming pools, restaurants, cabanas, gym, the in house Cipriani Services and much more. Cipriani Residences Miami's convenient location features green spaces, the bay, the ocean, dining options and more. The building is located just behind SLS Brickell and encompasses an entire block between S Miami Avenue and SW 1st Street.

This project is currently in under construction and prices start at $2,341,900. Please [contact us](https://miamiresidential.com/ciprianiresidences#contactform) for more information.

CONDOS FOR SALE

4 Bedrooms from $6,661,900

**Payment Plan**

20% At Contract

10% 6 months after contract

10% 12 months after contract

60% at Closing (2028)



## Features

### Building Features

- Exclusive private entrance with lush landscaping and elegant porte-cochère
- Dramatic lobby leading to two banks of high-speed, touchless elevators
- Signature private dining experiences by Cipriani
- In-home dining and 24-hour catering services by Cipriani, exclusive to residents
- Private dining rooms available for reservation, catered by Cipriani
- Elevated resort deck with two swimming pools, a blissful outdoor spa, poolside cabanas, and a beautifully landscaped sun terrace
- Poolside food and beverage services catered by Cipriani
- Holistic spa with sauna and treatment rooms
- Luxurious residents’ lounge for special events and intimate gatherings
- State-of-the-art fitness center
- Golf simulator
- Pickleball court
- Private salon available to be reserved for personal beauty services
- Screening room with cutting-edge audio visual equipment
- Serene and spacious residents’ library
- Engaging children’s playroom
- Elevated four-level wellness center and lounge overlooking the Brickell skyline
- Pet-friendly community with dog park
- High-speed internet access across all public areas
- Electric vehicle charging stations available
- Air-conditioned storage rooms
- Designated Director of Residences
- Cipriani Residential Concierge
- A secure, covered garage with 24-hour complimentary valet and optional self-parking in assigned spaces
- 24-hour security guards and controlled building access

### Residence Features

- Generous living areas with ceiling heights of 10 feet
- Floor-to-ceiling sliding glass doors and windows with magnificent panoramic views
- Terrace access from the living room and primary bedroom of every residence
- Gracious walk-in wardrobes in every primary bedroom
- An exquisite selection of flooring options included
- Direct elevator entry for select residences
- Eat-in, open kitchen with custom Italian cabinetry inspired by Cipriani’s renowned style
- Top-of-the-line appliances from Wolf Sub-Zero, including cooktop, integrated refrigerator, freezer, wine cooler, and dishwasher
- Primary bathrooms with grand, stand-alone bathtubs and glass-enclosed showers; vanities with premium Italian cabinetry, imported stone tops, back-lit mirrors; separate room with water closet
- Spacious laundry rooms with full-size washing machine and dryer, with a utility sink in most residences
- Individually controlled, high-efficiency central air conditioning and heating systems, with linear diffusers in main areas to ensure seamless integration
- Innovative smart technology infrastructure that enables home automation
- Intelligent interface system for essential building services such as concierge, valet, and security

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/08/21-Cipriani-Residences-Lobby-Exterior-e1678804774965.jpg)

## Developers

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/12-Developer-Mast-Capital.jpg)

Mast Capital is a vertically integrated real estate development and investment firm headquartered in Miami. Mast Capital's emphasis is on developing carefully designed projects that enrich local communities while generating strong returns. The company has created other magnificent buildings, including [Sole Miami](https://miamiresidential.com/sole/), Conrad Brickell or [Brickell Arch](https://miamiresidential.com/brickellarch/), Wake Biscayne Bay, 5333 Collins Ave, and other residential and commercial projects in South Florida.
